name: Proofrail for OpenClaw
description: Proofrail for OpenClaw: execution harness, runtime guardrails, evidence-first changes, and verification gates for OpenClaw agents.

dangerousCommandAction.description: Policy for high-risk commands. "block" stops execution, "approve" requires manual confirmation, "warn" audits but allows, "allow" passes through silently.

enforcementMode.description: Workflow-risk handling. "advisory" records guidance and allows tool calls; "strict" preserves hard-block behavior; "guarded" keeps advisory workflow risks but still honors dangerous-command blocking; "off" disables workflow-risk advisories.

advisoryInjection.description: How Proofrail injects advisory guidance into later model context.

validationPolicy.description: Validation cadence. "immediate" is accepted as a compatibility alias for "after_each_mutation".

mutationBatchMax.description: Maximum unverified mutation batch size before advisory severity escalates.

llmClassifierEnabled.description: Enable the gray-area classifier path. When true and the host exposes an LLM interface, Proofrail adds an LLM-backed classifier after deterministic checks pass. The classifier never overrides deterministic blocks such as missing evidence or pending verification.

llmClassifierProvider.description: Optional provider override for the classifier model. Omit or set to null to inherit the session's main provider.

llmClassifierModel.description: Optional model override for the classifier model. Omit or set to null to inherit the session's main model.
